title: Life of the Lac Viet People
summary: Explore the simple yet vibrant life of the Van Lang residents during the Hung King era.

slides.text: The Lac Viet people mainly lived by growing wet rice. They built dikes to prevent floods and used buffalo and oxen to plow the fields.
slides.imagePrompt: Ancient Vietnamese farmers working in rice fields with buffalo, green mountains, traditional loincloths, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors, flat design

slides.text: They lived in stilt houses to avoid wild animals and dampness. The houses were made from wood and bamboo with boat-shaped or round roofs.
slides.imagePrompt: Ancient Vietnamese stilt houses (nha san) in a village, people doing activities outside, peaceful scene, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors, flat design

slides.text: Lac Viet clothing was simple: men wore loincloths and were bare-chested with tattoos; women wore skirts and halter tops (yem), with stone or bronze jewelry.
slides.imagePrompt: People wearing ancient Lac Viet clothes, necklaces, bracelets, traditional patterns, distinct hairstyles, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors, flat design

slides.text: The Lac Viet were skilled in bronze casting, making many tools and especially exquisite Bronze Drums.
slides.imagePrompt: Ancient craftsmen casting bronze, making tools, a beautiful Dong Son drum in focus, fire glowing, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors, flat design

slides.text: They had many unique customs like chewing betel, dyeing their teeth black, and organizing festivals with boat racing, wrestling, and dancing.
slides.imagePrompt: Ancient Vietnamese festival, people racing long boats on a river and dancing, joyful atmosphere, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors, flat design

slides.question: What type of house did the Lac Viet people usually live in?
What was the main occupation of the Van Lang residents?
Which of the following customs did the Lac Viet people have?
options: Chewing betel and dyeing teeth black
slides.answer: Chewing betel and dyeing teeth black
